description:
This video first international day of yoga 2015 Cyril yogi conducted Yoga Camp in Poland Gdansk. This is just basic and common yoga class for everyone. If you have a plan to practice with this video you are most welcome. You can practice every day one hour continuously minimum 4 week. You’ll see some miracle in your life. Full of yoga benefits you wanted to maintain your life very honest, truthfulness and kindness. After 4week practice please give me some reviews under this video I am really happy if some people are benefited this video. If you're really interested to study more about Yoga you're most welcome for my class anywhere in the world. Kindly I request you please share this video maximum you can. 
Kind regards 
Cyril Yogi
www.cyrilyoga.com
